title: Configurator Item
description: A leaf item type that renders an editor for another item in the SAME document — its `target`. The configurator references the target by its stable instance `id`; the resolver (E5-S1) builds a tree-wide id index once and validates that the target id resolves to a real, id-carrying item (CONFIGURATOR_TARGET_NOT_FOUND when no item declares the id; CONFIGURATOR_TARGET_MISSING_ID when the target reference itself is empty/non-stable). Auto-generating the form from the target's configurable surface is E5-S2; this type carries the target reference + title only. A configurator never has children.

constraints.description: The heading rendered above the configurator's generated editor — editable at runtime.

target.description: The stable instance `id` of the item this configurator generates an editor for. Must reference an item declared in the same document that carries an `id`; validated by the resolver (E5-S1).

title.description: Optional heading rendered above the configurator's generated editor.
